name: Marketing Poster
description: Minimal marketing poster preview with header, hero composition, callout emphasis, and bottom support area.

name: Marketing Poster · Studio
description: Studio geometry style of the Marketing Poster: product breathing, stronger title hierarchy, and a lighter gallery. Same structure and Stage1 inputs.

name: Product Sheet
description: Minimal product sheet preview with banner, SKU copy, product hero, detail strip, and description area.

name: Catalog Hero · Portrait
description: Editorial portrait catalog poster: charcoal brand bar, warm food co-anchor, callout-ringed product, heavy red title, restated title, and an isolated-on-white product range gallery. The food scene is operator-supplied.

name: Email Campaign Composite · Campaign Explainer
description: Campaign-explainer composite (email_campaign_composite_v1): charcoal banner + logo chip, heavy red title, product hero, 3 callouts, evidence-backed spec strip, range gallery, and contact, over an operator-gated visual atmosphere substrate. Deterministic business truth; renders via /api/v2/generate-poster (puppeteer).
